features: A toilet bowl cleaner that releases a fragrant foam with every flush
Extend the clean with 4x more foam versus 5-in-1
Just attach the toilet cleaner to your toilet rim for long-lasting freshness
Helps to keep your toilet clean and fresh for up to 3 weeks
Powerful freshness is just a flush away with this toilet cleaner and descaler
description: Product Description Duck Active Clean Pine bathroom cleaner gives your toilet a renewed freshness with every flush, combining a wonderful Pine fragrance with the cleansing action of foam. Once you place it under your toilet rim, Duck Active Clean turns each and every flush into a foamy fresh rush of bubbles, keeping your toilet clean and fragrant for up to 3 weeks. Each pack of toilet rim cleaner includes 1 Active Clean product. Ingredients contains: <5% amphoteric surfactants, > 30% anionic surfactants; also contains: perfume, coumarin, butylphenyl methylpropional Directions HOW TO USE: 1. Unfold the hook and attach it to the inside edge of the toilet bowl. 2. Position it so that the product is under the largest water outlet during flushes. 3. When the product dissolves, throw the hook into the trash. Replace with a new Duck Active Clean. (Product has no refill). Manufacturer Contact Information SC Johnson Ltd., Camberley, GU16 7AJ.
